bottom.contains: solid blue border frame with a yellow instruction band on the right

left.contains: solid blue border frame with a vertical magenta text label

right.contains: branding panel with the Amazon Prime logo and white 'prime' text

frameAnalysis.corners: Amazon Prime smile logo and 'prime' text in the vertical center and top right quadrant of the blue panel.
frameAnalysis.instructions: Place the main hero subject and critical text within the central 80% of the art zone to ensure visibility and prevent obscuration by the wide right-side branding panel. Composition should generally favor a slight bias towards the left half of the art zone. Ensure no text or faces are placed close to any edge, particularly the right edge, as the branding panel extends significantly from that side.
